import{useState}from'react';import{validateFormData,createTemplateParams}from'../utils';import{sendOrderEmail}from'../services/emailService';import{categories}from'../constants';import{getImagePath}from'../utils';export const useOrderForm=()=>{const[formData,setFormData]=useState({company:'',storeNumber:'',storeManager:'',date:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],orderNotes:'',quantities:{},shirtVersions:{},colorVersions:{},shirtColorComboVersions:{}});const[error,setError]=useState(null);const[page,setPage]=useState('form');const[sending,setSending]=useState(false);const handleFormDataChange=updates=>{setFormData(prev=>({...prev,...updates}));};const handleQuantityChange=(imagePath,value)=>{setFormData(prev=>({...prev,quantities:{...prev.quantities,[imagePath]:value}}));};const _prev$shirtVersions;return{...prev,shirtVersions:{...prev.shirtVersions,[imagePath]:{...((_prev$shirtVersions=prev.shirtVersions)===null||_prev$shirtVersions===void 0?void 0:_prev$shirtVersions[imagePath]),[version]:value}}};});};const handleColorVersionChange=(imagePath,color,value)=>{setFormData(prev=>{var _prev$colorVersions;return{...prev,colorVersions:{...prev.colorVersions,[imagePath]:{...((_prev$colorVersions=prev.colorVersions)===null||_prev$colorVersions===void 0?void 0:_prev$colorVersions[imagePath]),[color]:value}}};});};const handleShirtColorComboChange=(imagePath,version,color,value)=>{setFormData(prev=>{var _prev$shirtColorCombo;return{...prev,shirtColorComboVersions:{...prev.shirtColorComboVersions,[imagePath]:{...((_prev$shirtColorCombo=prev.shirtColorComboVersions)===null||_prev$shirtColorCombo===void 0?void 0:_prev$shirtColorCombo[imagePath]),[`${version}_${color}`]:value}}};});};const handleSelectAll=()=>{const newQuantities={};const newShirtVersions={};const newColorVersions={};const newShirtColorComboVersions={};categories.forEach(category=>{category.images.forEach(img=>{const imagePath=getImagePath(category.path,img);if(img==='M100482538 SHHODC Hover DTF on Black or Forest .png'&&category.shirtVersions&&category.colorVersions){// For the special shirt, set all combos to 10
const combo={};for(const color of category.colorVersions){for(const version of category.shirtVersions){combo[`${version}_${color}`]='10';}}newShirtColorComboVersions[imagePath]=combo;}else if(category.hasShirtVersions&&category.shirtVersions){const shirtVersion={tshirt:'10',longsleeve:'10',hoodie:'10',crewneck:'10'};newShirtVersions[imagePath]=shirtVersion;}else if(category.hasColorVersions&&category.colorVersions){const colorVersion={black:'10',forest:'10',white:'10',gray:'10'};newColorVersions[imagePath]=colorVersion;}else{newQuantities[imagePath]='10';}});});setFormData(prev=>({...prev,quantities:newQuantities,shirtVersions:newShirtVersions,colorVersions:newColorVersions,shirtColorComboVersions:newShirtColorComboVersions}));};const handleFormSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const validationError=validateFormData(formData);if(validationError){setError(validationError);return;}setError(null);setPage('summary');};const handleBack=()=>{setPage('form');};const handleBackToSummary=()=>{setPage('summary');};const handleExit=()=>{setPage('thankyou');};const handleConfirm=async()=>{if(!window.confirm('Are you sure you want to submit this order?'))return;setSending(true);try{const templateParams=createTemplateParams(formData);await sendOrderEmail(templateParams);setPage('receipt');}catch(err){console.error('Email error:',err);alert('Failed to send email. Please check your EmailJS configuration and try again.');}finally{setSending(false);}};return{formData,error,page,sending,handleFormDataChange,handleQuantityChange,handleShirtVersionChange,handleColorVersionChange,handleShirtColorComboChange,handleSelectAll,handleFormSubmit,handleBack,handleBackToSummary,handleExit,handleConfirm};};
